zh-CN.title: 情绪命名处方
zh-CN.why_this_matters: 当你说不清自己的状态时，很容易直接进入解释、回避或自责。命名情绪能把混乱变成可处理的信息。
zh-CN.do_today: 今天选一个小情绪，用“事实 / 感受 / 需要”三列写下来。
zh-CN.script: “我先说清楚我的状态：我不是反对这件事，我是有点紧张，需要先确认下一步。”
zh-CN.watch_out: 不要把一次练习当成马上改变关系的保证。
zh-CN.when_to_use: 当你已经看懂问题，但下一步不知道怎么说、怎么停、怎么修复时使用。
zh-CN.do_not_overread: 这是自我练习建议，不是治疗方案。
zh-CN.when_not_to_use: 如果涉及安全、创伤、持续伤害或医疗/法律问题，不要用报告建议替代专业支持。
zh-CN.save_prompt: 把这条处方保存下来，未来一周只练这一件事。
zh-CN.share_prompt: 如果要分享，可以只分享这条行动，不需要分享分数。
zh-CN.retest_prompt: 练习一段时间后再复测，观察你的自我感知是否变稳定。
zh-CN.agent_followup_prompt: 如果你之后问 Agent，可以直接说：帮我练这条处方。
progress_markers: 你能更快说出自己的状态。
你能把支持范围说得更具体。
冲突后反刍时间变短。
zh-CN.one_minute_version: 先做一次 60 秒暂停，再用一句话说清事实、感受和下一步。
zh-CN.agent_prompt_seed: 帮我把这条处方应用到我最近的一个真实场景里。

en.title: Name the Feeling
en.why_this_matters: When you cannot name your state, it is easy to jump into explaining, avoiding, or blaming yourself. Naming the feeling turns noise into usable information.
en.do_today: Today, pick one small emotional moment and write three columns: fact, feeling, need.
en.script: “Let me name my state first: I’m not against this; I’m tense and need to clarify the next step.”

seven_day_plan.practice: State your condition in one sentence.

en.watch_out: Do not treat one exercise as a promise that a relationship will change immediately.
en.when_to_use: Use this when you understand the pattern but need help with what to say, where to pause, or how to repair.
en.do_not_overread: This is a self-development practice, not a treatment plan.
en.when_not_to_use: If safety, trauma, ongoing harm, medical, or legal issues are involved, do not use report guidance as a substitute for professional support.
en.save_prompt: Save this prescription and practice only this one move for the week.
en.share_prompt: If you share anything, share the action rather than your score.
en.retest_prompt: After practicing, retake the assessment to see whether your self-view has become steadier.
en.agent_followup_prompt: Later, you can ask the Agent to help you practice this prescription.
progress_markers: You can name your state sooner.
You can state the scope of support more clearly.
You spend less time replaying conflict afterward.
en.one_minute_version: Take a 60-second pause, then name the fact, feeling, and next step in one sentence.
en.agent_prompt_seed: Help me apply this prescription to a recent real situation.

zh-CN.title: 暂停恢复处方
zh-CN.why_this_matters: 你可能很快意识到自己被触发，但需要一个更早的身体暂停，才能把觉察转成选择。
zh-CN.do_today: 下一次想马上回复时，先做一次完整呼气，再决定是否说话。
zh-CN.script: “我想先停十秒，免得我现在说得太快。”

seven_day_plan.practice: 用慢一点的语速复述问题
给自己一个延迟回应句
设置一个下周继续练的场景

zh-CN.watch_out: 不要把一次练习当成马上改变关系的保证。

en.title: Pause Before the Pattern Takes Over
en.why_this_matters: You may notice activation quickly, but you need an earlier body-level pause to turn awareness into choice.
en.do_today: The next time you want to respond immediately, take one full exhale before speaking.
en.script: “I want to take ten seconds so I don’t answer too quickly.”

seven_day_plan.practice: Put the phone down for 30 seconds.
Record what changed after the pause.
Choose one scene to keep practicing next week.

en.watch_out: Do not treat one exercise as a promise that a relationship will change immediately.
en.when_to_use: Use this when you understand the pattern but need help with what to say, where to pause, or how to repair.

zh-CN.title: 反馈拆压处方
zh-CN.why_this_matters: 反馈容易被身体听成否定。拆开事实、影响和请求，可以降低防御反应。
zh-CN.do_today: 把一条反馈拆成：对方看到什么、担心什么、希望我改什么。
zh-CN.script: “我先确认一下，你希望我改的是结果、流程，还是沟通方式？”

seven_day_plan.practice: 复盘自己是否少防御了一点

zh-CN.watch_out: 不要把一次练习当成马上改变关系的保证。

en.title: Separate Feedback From Threat
en.why_this_matters: Feedback can land in the body as rejection. Separating fact, impact, and request lowers defensiveness.
en.do_today: Break one piece of feedback into: what they saw, what they worry about, what they want changed.
en.script: “Let me check: do you want me to change the outcome, the process, or the communication?”

seven_day_plan.practice: Write the exact words, not the feeling.
Review whether defensiveness dropped even slightly.

en.watch_out: Do not treat one exercise as a promise that a relationship will change immediately.
en.when_to_use: Use this when you understand the pattern but need help with what to say, where to pause, or how to repair.
en.do_not_overread: This is a self-development practice, not a treatment plan.
en.when_not_to_use: If safety, trauma, ongoing harm, medical, or legal issues are involved, do not use report guidance as a substitute for professional support.

en.share_prompt: If you share anything, share the action rather than your score.
en.retest_prompt: After practicing, retake the assessment to see whether your self-view has become steadier.
en.agent_followup_prompt: Later, you can ask the Agent to help you practice this prescription.

You can state the scope of support more clearly.
You spend less time replaying conflict afterward.
en.one_minute_version: Take a 60-second pause, then name the fact, feeling, and next step in one sentence.
en.agent_prompt_seed: Help me apply this prescription to a recent real situation.

zh-CN.title: 共情边界处方
zh-CN.why_this_matters: 共情不是问题，问题是把理解别人变成替别人承担。边界让共情可持续。
zh-CN.do_today: 今天在一次倾听里，只提供一个具体下一步，不接下整个问题。
zh-CN.script: “我理解这对你很难。我能帮你一起理下一步，但我不能替你承担全部。”

seven_day_plan.practice: 识别一次想立刻帮忙的冲动
只提供一个可完成动作
记录对方是否真的需要更多
总结哪种边界句最自然

zh-CN.watch_out: 不要把一次练习当成马上改变关系的保证。
zh-CN.when_to_use: 当你已经看懂问题，但下一步不知道怎么说、怎么停、怎么修复时使用。

en.title: Care Without Carrying
en.why_this_matters: Empathy is not the problem. The problem is turning understanding into ownership. Boundaries make empathy sustainable.
en.do_today: In one listening moment today, offer one concrete next step without taking over the whole issue.
en.script: “I can see this is hard. I can help sort the next step, but I can’t carry the whole thing for you.”

seven_day_plan.practice: Notice one impulse to jump in and help.
Ask what the person actually needs.
State what you cannot take on.
Observe whether more help was truly needed.
Keep the boundary line that felt most natural.

en.watch_out: Do not treat one exercise as a promise that a relationship will change immediately.
en.when_to_use: Use this when you understand the pattern but need help with what to say, where to pause, or how to repair.
en.do_not_overread: This is a self-development practice, not a treatment plan.
en.when_not_to_use: If safety, trauma, ongoing harm, medical, or legal issues are involved, do not use report guidance as a substitute for professional support.

zh-CN.title: 冲突后修复处方
zh-CN.why_this_matters: 表达立场只是沟通的一半。修复能把对话从态度问题带回合作问题。
zh-CN.do_today: 回想一次小摩擦，补一句承认影响和下一步。
zh-CN.script: “刚才我的语气可能让你感觉被否定了。我的重点是这个问题本身，我们重新对一下下一步。”

seven_day_plan.practice: 选一个低风险修复对象

zh-CN.watch_out: 不要把一次练习当成马上改变关系的保证。

en.title: Repair After Tension
en.why_this_matters: Stating your position is only half the conversation. Repair brings the moment back from tone to collaboration.
en.do_today: Think of one small friction point and add one acknowledgment plus one next step.
en.script: “My tone may have made you feel dismissed. My point is the issue itself—can we reset and decide the next step?”

seven_day_plan.practice: Write the impact you want to repair.

zh-CN.title: 不升级的表达处方
zh-CN.why_this_matters: 真实表达不需要更大声。清楚的句式可以减少误解，也保护关系。
zh-CN.do_today: 把一个不满改写成“我观察到 / 我感到 / 我希望”。
zh-CN.script: “我注意到这件事临时改变了。我有点被打乱。下次能不能提前告诉我？”
zh-CN.watch_out: 不要把一次练习当成马上改变关系的保证。
zh-CN.when_to_use: 当你已经看懂问题，但下一步不知道怎么说、怎么停、怎么修复时使用。
zh-CN.do_not_overread: 这是自我练习建议，不是治疗方案。

en.title: Say It Without Turning Up the Heat
en.why_this_matters: Honest expression does not need to be louder. Clear wording can reduce misunderstanding and protect the relationship.
en.do_today: Rewrite one frustration as: I noticed / I felt / I would prefer.
en.script: “I noticed the plan changed last minute. I felt thrown off. Could you tell me earlier next time?”

seven_day_plan.practice: Read it in a steady tone.
Try it in one small situation.

en.watch_out: Do not treat one exercise as a promise that a relationship will change immediately.

zh-CN.title: 支持但不拯救处方
zh-CN.why_this_matters: 好的支持不是替对方生活，而是帮助对方看见下一步。
zh-CN.do_today: 当别人求助时，先问“你希望我听你说，还是一起想下一步？”
zh-CN.script: “我愿意陪你理清楚，但这个决定还是需要你自己做。”

seven_day_plan.practice: 识别一次想替对方解决的冲动
先问对方要倾听还是建议
结束时确认下一步由谁做

en.title: Support Without Rescuing
en.why_this_matters: Good support does not live someone else’s life for them; it helps them see the next step.
en.do_today: When someone asks for support, first ask, “Do you want me to listen, or help think through the next step?”
en.script: “I’m willing to help you think it through, and the decision still needs to be yours.”

seven_day_plan.practice: Notice one urge to solve it for them.
Ask whether they want listening or advice.
Do not make the decision for them.
Clarify who owns the next step.
Keep the question that worked best.

en.watch_out: Do not treat one exercise as a promise that a relationship will change immediately.
en.when_to_use: Use this when you understand the pattern but need help with what to say, where to pause, or how to repair.
en.do_not_overread: This is a self-development practice, not a treatment plan.
en.when_not_to_use: If safety, trauma, ongoing harm, medical, or legal issues are involved, do not use report guidance as a substitute for professional support.

zh-CN.title: 从冷静到有温度处方
zh-CN.why_this_matters: 稳定是优势，但对方需要先知道你听见了情绪，才更容易听见你的方案。
zh-CN.do_today: 下一次给方案前，先说一句“我听出来这让你很不舒服”。
zh-CN.script: “我先不急着给建议。我听出来这件事让你很受影响。”

seven_day_plan.practice: 选一个你容易直接给方案的场景
给一个方案而不是三个
复盘温度有没有改变对话

zh-CN.watch_out: 不要把一次练习当成马上改变关系的保证。
zh-CN.when_to_use: 当你已经看懂问题，但下一步不知道怎么说、怎么停、怎么修复时使用。
zh-CN.do_not_overread: 这是自我练习建议，不是治疗方案。
zh-CN.when_not_to_use: 如果涉及安全、创伤、持续伤害或医疗/法律问题，不要用报告建议替代专业支持。
zh-CN.save_prompt: 把这条处方保存下来，未来一周只练这一件事。
zh-CN.share_prompt: 如果要分享，可以只分享这条行动，不需要分享分数。
zh-CN.retest_prompt: 练习一段时间后再复测，观察你的自我感知是否变稳定。
zh-CN.agent_followup_prompt: 如果你之后问 Agent，可以直接说：帮我练这条处方。
progress_markers: 你能更快说出自己的状态。
你能把支持范围说得更具体。
冲突后反刍时间变短。
zh-CN.one_minute_version: 先做一次 60 秒暂停，再用一句话说清事实、感受和下一步。
zh-CN.agent_prompt_seed: 帮我把这条处方应用到我最近的一个真实场景里。

en.title: Add Warmth Before the Fix
en.why_this_matters: Steadiness is a strength, but people often need to feel emotionally heard before they can hear the solution.
en.do_today: Before offering a solution, say one line such as, “I can tell this has been frustrating.”
en.script: “I don’t want to jump straight to advice. I can tell this has affected you.”

seven_day_plan.practice: Choose one scene where you tend to give advice fast.
Review whether warmth changed the conversation.

en.watch_out: Do not treat one exercise as a promise that a relationship will change immediately.
en.when_to_use: Use this when you understand the pattern but need help with what to say, where to pause, or how to repair.
en.do_not_overread: This is a self-development practice, not a treatment plan.
en.when_not_to_use: If safety, trauma, ongoing harm, medical, or legal issues are involved, do not use report guidance as a substitute for professional support.
en.save_prompt: Save this prescription and practice only this one move for the week.
en.share_prompt: If you share anything, share the action rather than your score.
en.retest_prompt: After practicing, retake the assessment to see whether your self-view has become steadier.
en.agent_followup_prompt: Later, you can ask the Agent to help you practice this prescription.
progress_markers: You can name your state sooner.
You can state the scope of support more clearly.
You spend less time replaying conflict afterward.
en.one_minute_version: Take a 60-second pause, then name the fact, feeling, and next step in one sentence.
en.agent_prompt_seed: Help me apply this prescription to a recent real situation.

zh-CN.title: 关系能量管理处方
zh-CN.why_this_matters: 你能处理很多互动，但能处理不代表都该由你处理。
zh-CN.do_today: 今天结束前写下：哪些情绪是我的，哪些只是我接触到的。
zh-CN.script: “这件事我会跟进我负责的部分，其他部分我们需要分开处理。”

seven_day_plan.practice: 列出今天三个高互动时刻
写下你实际负责的部分
复盘哪类互动最需要限制

zh-CN.watch_out: 不要把一次练习当成马上改变关系的保证。

en.title: Manage Relational Energy
en.why_this_matters: You may be able to handle many interactions, but ability does not mean every interaction belongs to you.
en.do_today: At the end of today, list which emotions were yours and which ones you merely encountered.
en.script: “I’ll follow up on the part I own; the rest needs to be handled separately.”

seven_day_plan.practice: Mark the one that drained you most.
Name the part you truly owned.
Name the part you did not own.
Set a boundary earlier next time.

en.watch_out: Do not treat one exercise as a promise that a relationship will change immediately.
en.when_to_use: Use this when you understand the pattern but need help with what to say, where to pause, or how to repair.
en.do_not_overread: This is a self-development practice, not a treatment plan.
en.when_not_to_use: If safety, trauma, ongoing harm, medical, or legal issues are involved, do not use report guidance as a substitute for professional support.

en.one_minute_version: Take a 60-second pause, then name the fact, feeling, and next step in one sentence.
en.agent_prompt_seed: Help me apply this prescription to a recent real situation.

zh-CN.title: 冲突降温处方
zh-CN.why_this_matters: 冲突里最先需要的常常不是答案，而是把对话从证明谁对拉回要解决什么。
zh-CN.do_today: 下一次分歧出现时，只问一个问题：“我们现在最不同意的是哪一点？”
zh-CN.script: “我感觉我们在争两个不同的问题。先把分歧点拆开。”

seven_day_plan.practice: 复盘是否少升级了一点

zh-CN.watch_out: 不要把一次练习当成马上改变关系的保证。
zh-CN.when_to_use: 当你已经看懂问题，但下一步不知道怎么说、怎么停、怎么修复时使用。

en.title: Lower the Temperature
en.why_this_matters: In conflict, the first useful move is often not the answer; it is moving the conversation from proving who is right to naming what needs to be solved.
en.do_today: The next time disagreement appears, ask one question: “What exactly are we disagreeing about?”
en.script: “I think we’re arguing about two different things. Let’s separate the points.”

seven_day_plan.practice: Do not explain your position first.
Reflect one sentence from the other person.

en.watch_out: Do not treat one exercise as a promise that a relationship will change immediately.
en.when_to_use: Use this when you understand the pattern but need help with what to say, where to pause, or how to repair.
en.do_not_overread: This is a self-development practice, not a treatment plan.
en.when_not_to_use: If safety, trauma, ongoing harm, medical, or legal issues are involved, do not use report guidance as a substitute for professional support.

You can state the scope of support more clearly.
You spend less time replaying conflict afterward.
en.one_minute_version: Take a 60-second pause, then name the fact, feeling, and next step in one sentence.

zh-CN.title: 自我连接处方
zh-CN.why_this_matters: 如果你长期先处理关系，自己的感受会变得很晚才出现。自我连接是让边界提前出现。
zh-CN.do_today: 今天问自己一次：如果不考虑气氛，我真实想要什么？
zh-CN.script: “我需要先确认一下自己的想法，不能马上答应。”

seven_day_plan.practice: 观察关系是否真的变差

zh-CN.watch_out: 不要把一次练习当成马上改变关系的保证。
zh-CN.when_to_use: 当你已经看懂问题，但下一步不知道怎么说、怎么停、怎么修复时使用。

en.title: Return to Your Own Signal
en.why_this_matters: If you habitually handle the relationship first, your own signal may arrive late. Self-connection brings boundaries earlier.
en.do_today: Ask yourself once today: if I were not managing the atmosphere, what would I actually want?
en.script: “I need to check in with myself before I say yes.”

seven_day_plan.practice: Name what you were afraid of disrupting.
Observe whether the relationship actually worsened.

en.watch_out: Do not treat one exercise as a promise that a relationship will change immediately.
en.when_to_use: Use this when you understand the pattern but need help with what to say, where to pause, or how to repair.
en.do_not_overread: This is a self-development practice, not a treatment plan.
en.when_not_to_use: If safety, trauma, ongoing harm, medical, or legal issues are involved, do not use report guidance as a substitute for professional support.

zh-CN.title: 复测与观察处方
zh-CN.why_this_matters: 低置信结果更适合作为观察线索。复测前先改善作答状态，会让报告更有参考价值。
zh-CN.do_today: 记录本次作答时的状态：时间、注意力、情绪、是否匆忙。
zh-CN.script: “我先不急着给这次结果下结论，等状态稳定时再测一次。”

seven_day_plan.practice: 标记可能影响答案的因素
安排一次更安静的复测
对比两次结果是否一致

zh-CN.watch_out: 不要把一次练习当成马上改变关系的保证。

en.title: Retest With Better Conditions
en.why_this_matters: A low-confidence result is better treated as a set of clues. Improving the response conditions before retesting makes the next report more useful.
en.do_today: Record the conditions of this session: time, attention, mood, and whether you felt rushed.
en.script: “I’m not going to over-read this result; I’ll retake it when I can answer more steadily.”

seven_day_plan.practice: Mark what may have affected answers.
Observe real interactions for three days.
Compare whether the two results align.
